title: June Identify Request
description: Request body schema for the June Tracking API /identify endpoint.

userId.description: The ID for this user in your database. At least one of userId or anonymousId must be provided.

anonymousId.description: An ID for the user when identity is unknown.

traits.description: User attributes such as email, name, company, etc.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when identification occurred. Defaults to server time if omitted.

context.description: Extra context to attach to the call.
